title: Accreditation Credential
description: The Accreditation Credential schema captures the fact of licensure at issuance time — that a verified individual holds a valid professional licence from a recognized regulatory body

cornerstone_id.title: Cornerstone ID Reference
cornerstone_id.description: DID or URI reference to the holder's verified Cornerstone ID credential. Binds this credential to a verified identity without embedding identity attributes.

profession_category.title: Profession Category
profession_category.description: Category of the professional's regulated activity. Free-form initially; standardization with a controlled vocabulary is planned.

licence_number.title: Licence Number
licence_number.description: Unique licence or registration number issued by the provincial regulator.

licence_expiry.title: Licence Expiry
licence_expiry.description: Expiry date of the professional licence from the regulator record, in ISO 8601 format.

regulator_name.title: Regulator Name
regulator_name.description: Name of the provincial regulatory body that governs the licence (e.g., BCFSA, RECO, OACIQ).

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: Province or territorial jurisdiction under which the licence is granted (e.g., BC, ON, QC).

evidence.title: Evidence Reference
evidence.description: URI reference to the verification evidence record, including regulator registry source, verification author, and date.
